purpose: Redesigned, data-disclosed SVG figures for the pressure term ledger, plus a reusable chart toolkit and palette validator.
scope: Salt 2/3/4 Jin mainline pressure term ledger (18 rows); presentation/thesis figures only, no new CFD extraction.
method_notes: Palette validated with tools/analyze/palette_validator.py (dataviz checks: lightness band, chroma floor, Machado-2009 CVD delta-E, WCAG contrast) — all PASS on the light surface; worst adjacent CVD delta-E ~= 97.
Figures rendered to PNG and visually inspected for label collisions before finalizing.
Full data disclosure: every plotted value is in figure_data.csv; DATA_DISCLOSURE.md gives the column->visual mapping, units, and sign convention.
open_questions_for_user: Should build_postprocessor_summary_charts.py (Codex AGENT-233) be updated to call the new svg_chart_kit so the July 8 package regenerates these improved figures in place? That needs a claim on Codex-owned paths.
